questions.stem: (ANTICOAGULANTS Q001) In a Pharmacology scenario, which nursing action is the best next step for anticoagulant medications: heparin, warfarin, and doacs?
questions.rationale: Select the response that prioritizes immediate safety, focused assessment, and evidence-based escalation within Anticoagulant Medications: Heparin, Warfarin, and DOACs.
options: Perform focused assessment and immediate safe intervention
Wait for next scheduled reassessment period
Delay action until additional nonurgent data returns
Transfer critical judgment to inappropriate personnel
questions.correctAnswer: Perform focused assessment and immediate safe intervention

questions.stem: (ANTICOAGULANTS Q002) In a Pharmacology scenario, which nursing action is the best next step for anticoagulant medications: heparin, warfarin, and doacs?
questions.rationale: Select the response that prioritizes immediate safety, focused assessment, and evidence-based escalation within Anticoagulant Medications: Heparin, Warfarin, and DOACs.
options: Prioritize focused assessment for instability cues
Delay intervention until routine review time
Escalate urgent deterioration using chain of command
Implement protocol-based nursing intervention promptly
Delegate critical clinical judgment to unlicensed staff
correctAnswer: Prioritize focused assessment for instability cues
Escalate urgent deterioration using chain of command
Implement protocol-based nursing intervention promptly
